app.name: ResearchPilot
app.tagline: AI-powered research management for academic publishing

tabs.label: Dashboard
tabs.purpose: Quick overview: project count, paper count, recent activity, shortcuts

tabs.label: Chat
tabs.purpose: AI assistant for paper analysis, writing, 12-point extraction, comparison

tabs.label: Web Research
tabs.purpose: Search academic databases (OpenAlex, Crossref, Semantic Scholar, PubMed)

tabs.label: Projects
tabs.purpose: Manage research projects: create, edit, archive

tabs.label: Upload
tabs.purpose: Drop PDF/DOCX/PPTX files; auto-converted to .md in chosen project

tabs.label: Library
tabs.purpose: Browse all files in a project; filter, search, read, open

tabs.label: Graph
tabs.purpose: Visual knowledge graph: papers, extractions, keywords, projects

tabs.label: Memory
tabs.purpose: All .md files in one place: chats, extractions, notes, drafts across every project. Search, read, and open from a single table.

tabs.label: Memory
tabs.purpose: Alias kept for backward compat — same view as the top-level Memory tab.

tabs.label: Settings
tabs.purpose: Configure AI engines, API keys, skills, knowledge base, keywords, profile, plugins, Obsidian integration. Also hosts the Trash, Chats, and Memory sub-views.

settings_sections.label: AI Engines
settings_sections.purpose: Configure Claude, GPT, OpenRouter, custom APIs. Most important section for first-time setup.

settings_sections.label: Skills
settings_sections.purpose: Reusable instructions the AI follows (writing style, extraction templates)

settings_sections.label: Keywords
settings_sections.purpose: Searchable keyword index across all papers

settings_sections.label: Author
settings_sections.purpose: Your name, affiliation, ORCID — used in paper metadata

settings_sections.label: Obsidian
settings_sections.purpose: Open vault, view graph, integration status

settings_sections.label: Memory
settings_sections.purpose: View, search, and read every .md file across the system (chats, extractions, notes, drafts)

settings_sections.label: Trash
settings_sections.purpose: Restore or permanently delete soft-deleted files and projects

settings_sections.label: Chats
settings_sections.purpose: Manage saved chat sessions: open, archive, or delete

steps: Paste your OpenAI key (or OpenRouter key)
AI will use project files as context
Select the paper as File context
Click any node to read the file
Open Web Research tab → Imported Papers
Click Open Vault — opens your entire .md library
